transcript: Speaker A: दिन भर इतना रील्स चलाते हो, कभी ये सोचा है कि इससे मेरा फायदा क्या हो रहा है? मैं भी वही करती थी, काम के बीच फोन उठाती और बस वही स्क्रॉल करती रहती थी। फिर एक दिन सोचा, यही करना है क्या पूरी लाइफ? इंस्टाग्राम के अलावा दिमाग कहीं और भी लगा सकती हूं। तब मैंने SpeakX डाउनलोड किया और सच बताऊं, एक नंबर ऐप है। इसके AI इंग्लिश टीचर ने मुझे सिर्फ बात-बात में ही इंग्लिश बोलना सिखा दिया, वो भी सिर्फ दो हफ्ते में। अब जब भी मैं किसी से भी कॉन्फिडेंस में बात करती हूं, लोग कहते हैं मैं बदल गई हूं और मुझे अंदर से खुशी मिलती है। मेरी बात मानो, स्क्रॉल करना बंद करो और SpeakX से इंग्लिश सीखो। [You scroll reels all day, have you ever thought about how this benefits me? I used to do the same, picking up my phone during work and just scrolling. Then one day I thought, is this what I want to do my whole life? I can use my brain somewhere other than Instagram. Then I downloaded SpeakX and to be honest, it's a top-class app. Its AI English teacher taught me to speak English just by talking, and that too in just two weeks. Now whenever I speak to anyone with confidence, people say I have changed and I feel happy from within. Take my advice, stop scrolling and learn English with SpeakX.]
on_screen_text: Din bhar itna [All day so much] / kabhi ye socha [ever thought this] / fayda kya ho raha [what is the benefit] / Main bhi wahi [I also did the same] / aur bas wahi [and just that] / yahi karna hai [is this what to do] / Instagram ke [other than Instagram] / laga sakti hoon [can apply (my mind)] / tab maine SpeakX [then I downloaded SpeakX] / ek number app [top-class app] / teacher ne mujhe [teacher taught me] / bolna sikha diya [taught me to speak] / wo bhi sirf do [that too in just two] / hafte mein. [weeks.] / Ab jab bhi main [Now whenever I] / confidence mein [with confidence] / log kehte hain, [people say,] / main badal gayi [I have changed] / khushi milti hai, [get happiness,] / meri baat maano, [take my advice,] / scroll karna [stop scrolling] / se English seekho. [learn English from.]
summary: The presenter urges viewers to stop wasting time scrolling social media reels and instead use SpeakX to learn English. She shares how the app's AI teacher helped her speak confidently in just two weeks. The ad ends with a call to action to download SpeakX and start learning.
